evals.expected_output: Reads roadmap, finds first In Progress or Not Started milestone, diffs its materials table against repo state, surfaces gaps, proposes next work items.
assertions: Skill identifies the first milestone with status In Progress or Not Started
Skill checks each item in the milestone materials table against actual repo state
Report identifies which materials exist and which are missing
Report proposes at least one concrete next work item
Skill does not modify any files

evals.prompt: Review the active milestone (when all milestones are Done)
evals.expected_output: Skill reports project is complete. No gaps surfaced.
assertions: Skill reads all milestone statuses from roadmap.md
Skill reports that all milestones are Done
Skill does not propose new work items
Skill does not modify any files
